# ArtHOI: Taming Foundation Models for Monocular 4D Reconstruction of Hand-Articulated-Object Interactions

**CVPR 2026 Submission**

**NOTE: This README file is generated by an LLM based on the paper and repository contents. It only serve as a extra description for the webpage and may contain inaccuracy contents. Please refer to the paper / webpage for accurate information.**

[**Project Page**](https://hitcs-zikaiwang.github.io/ArtHOI-reconstruction-webpage/) | Paper (Coming Soon) | Code (Coming Soon) | Data (Coming Soon)

---

## Overview

This repository hosts the **official project webpage** for *ArtHOI*, a framework for reconstructing 4D hand-articulated-object interactions from a single monocular RGB video — without any pre-scanned object template or multi-view input.

**Authors:** Zikai Wang¹, Zhilu Zhang¹&thinsp;✉, Yiqing Wang², Hui Li¹, Wangmeng Zuo¹  
**Affiliations:** ¹ Harbin Institute of Technology &nbsp;&nbsp; ² Shanghai Jiao Tong University  
**Contact:** cs-zikaiwang@outlook.com · cszlzhang@outlook.com

---

## Abstract

Existing hand-object interaction methods are largely limited to rigid objects, while articulated-object 4D reconstruction often requires pre-scanning or multi-view videos. ArtHOI addresses this gap with an optimization-based framework that integrates and refines priors from multiple foundation models. We propose **Adaptive Sampling Refinement (ASR)** to estimate metric object scale and pose from normalized image-to-3D outputs, and an **MLLM-guided hand-object alignment** strategy that uses contact reasoning as optimization constraints. We also introduce **ArtHOI-RGBD** and **ArtHOI-Wild** for evaluation on both controlled and in-the-wild articulated interactions.

---

## Method Highlights

- **Foundation Model Preprocessing** — SAM2 (segmentation) · Video-Depth-Anything (metric depth) · DiffuEraser (inpainting) · HunYuan3D (3D mesh)
- **ASR** — Resolves scale ambiguity of normalized image-to-3D output via iterative silhouette-guided scale-pose search
- **Part-wise Motion Reconstruction** — CoTracker3 dense tracking + occlusion-aware SE(3) optimization per part
- **MLLM-Guided Alignment** — Qwen-VL contact reasoning drives two-stage hand-object scale and pose refinement

---

## Datasets

| Dataset | Description |
|---|---|
| **ArtHOI-RGBD** | 5 RealSense RGBD sequences with metric depth and part-motion annotations |
| **ArtHOI-Wild** | 8 in-the-wild clips from internet and smartphone sources |
| **RSRD (subset)** | 9 videos for cross-method evaluation |
